section_title: Publication of Authentic English Text.-- After the commencement of this Act, the Government shall, by notification
content:
404. Publication of Authentic English Text.-- After the commencement of this Act, the Government shall, by notification
in the official gazette publish a Text of this Act translated in English, and this Text shall be called the Authentic English Text
of the Act :
Provided that in the event of conflict between the Act (Bangali Text) and he said English Text. the Act shall prevail.
